title: Flow State
description: State definition for Flow workflows. Each state represents a status in the entity lifecycle.

name.description: The state name. Must match an existing status entity name.

stage.description: Stage grouping for this state (e.g., 'Processing', 'Completed'). Used for organizing states in the UI.

parent.description: Parent state name for hierarchical organization. Child states inherit parent transitions.

isInitial.description: Indicates this is the initial state for new entities. At most one state can be marked as initial.

isFinal.description: Indicates this is a final/terminal state. Final states cannot be transition sources.

requireConfirmation.description: Requires user confirmation before transitioning to this state.

onEnter.description: Steps to execute when entering this state. Executed after the transition steps.

onExit.description: Steps to execute when exiting this state. Executed before the transition steps.

query.description: GraphQL-style query string specifying fields to load when entity is in this state. Overrides the entity-level query.
